# NCUpdateResult.newData

**Case**

The update resulted in new data to display.

## Declaration

```swift
case newData
```

## Discussion

When new data is available, the widget might have to update its layout.

## Constants

- **NCUpdateResult.noData**: The update did not result in any new data since the last update.
- **NCUpdateResult.failed**: The update attempt failed.
